title: rubus mulsantii
intro: Rubus mulsantii, also known as the French black raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus mulsantii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus mulsantii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular choice for natural remedies in traditional medicine.
